name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-16
title: Dead-code sweep: prune/delete tombstone test files
description:
Six items per the ws37 dead-code sweep rubric:
1. DELETE test-backlog-9-no-dual-path.py — asserts 'agent-local' phrase absent from tdd-subagent.md; text was removed and zero forward pressure.
2. DELETE test-rabbit-feature-touch-skill-ownership.py — t1 (tdd-subagent/skills absent) and t3 (surface.skills=[]) are tombstone; t2's positive assertion covered by rabbit-feature test suite.
3. DELETE test-surface-skills-retired.py — asserts surface.skills=[] which is structurally guaranteed by feature.json schema; no live behavioral guard.
4. PRUNE test-dispatch-tdd-new-interface.py — remove t1 (--bug rejected) and t2 (--backlog rejected) tombstone checks; keep t3-t8 live assertions.
5. PRUNE test-five-prompt-fixes.py — remove 'not bug-status.py' and 'not backlog-item-status.py' tombstone absence checks in BUG-15 section; keep remaining 4 BUG live assertions.
6. PRUNE test-slim-after-extraction.py — remove tdd-context.py and tdd-drift-check.py absence assertions (tombstone for BACKLOG-7 deleted scripts); keep tdd-step.py live assertions.

history.note: Closed: deleted 3 tombstone test files, pruned 3 mixed-content test files. PR #170.
